---
title: "[Platform Name] API Complete Specification"
subtitle: "Platform ID: [XXX]"
author: "MAMBA Architecture Team"
date: "[Date]"
version: "1.0.0"
---

# [Platform Name] API Documentation

## Overview

[Brief description of the platform and its primary use cases in e-commerce]

## API Information

### Base URLs

```
Production: https://api.[platform].com
Staging: https://api-staging.[platform].com
Sandbox: https://sandbox-api.[platform].com
```

### Authentication

[Describe authentication method: OAuth2, API Key, JWT, etc.]

```r
# Environment Variables Required
[XXX]_API_BASE_URL=https://api.[platform].com
[XXX]_API_KEY=your_api_key
[XXX]_API_SECRET=your_api_secret
# Add other required variables
```

### Rate Limits

- **Requests per second**: [number]
- **Requests per minute**: [number]
- **Requests per hour**: [number]
- **Requests per day**: [number]
- **Concurrent requests**: [number]
- **Max payload size**: [size]MB
- **Burst capacity**: [number] (if applicable)

### API Versions

| Version | Status | End of Life | Notes |
|---------|--------|-------------|-------|
| v1 | Current | - | Latest stable version |
| v0 | Deprecated | 2025-12-31 | Legacy support only |

### API Scopes/Permissions

| Scope | Description | Permissions |
|-------|-------------|-------------|
| `read_[resource]` | Read [resource] data | View [specific permissions] |
| `write_[resource]` | Write [resource] data | Create, update [specific permissions] |
| [Add all available scopes] | | |

## API Endpoints

### [Resource Category] API (e.g., Customers API)

#### List [Resources]

```http
GET /v1/[resources]
```

**Parameters:**
- `page` (integer): Page number (default: 1)
- `per_page` (integer): Items per page (default: 50, max: [max])
- `[filter_param]` ([type]): [Description]
- [Add all available parameters]

**Response:**
```json
{
  "[resources]": [
    {
      "id": "[resource]_123456",
      "[field]": "[value]",
      // Add all response fields with example values
    }
  ],
  "meta": {
    "page": 1,
    "per_page": 50,
    "total_pages": 10,
    "total_count": 500
  }
}
```

**Response Codes:**
- `200 OK`: Success
- `400 Bad Request`: Invalid parameters
- `401 Unauthorized`: Authentication failed
- `403 Forbidden`: Insufficient permissions
- `404 Not Found`: Resource not found
- `429 Too Many Requests`: Rate limit exceeded
- `500 Internal Server Error`: Server error

#### Get Single [Resource]

```http
GET /v1/[resources]/{[resource]_id}
```

**Parameters:**
- `[resource]_id` (string, required): The [resource] identifier

**Response:**
```json
{
  "id": "[resource]_123456",
  "[field]": "[value]",
  // Complete resource object
}
```

#### Create [Resource]

```http
POST /v1/[resources]
```

**Request Body:**
```json
{
  "[resource]": {
    "[required_field]": "[value]",
    "[optional_field]": "[value]"
  }
}
```

**Response:**
```json
{
  "id": "[resource]_789",
  // Created resource object
}
```

#### Update [Resource]

```http
PUT /v1/[resources]/{[resource]_id}
PATCH /v1/[resources]/{[resource]_id}
```

**Request Body:**
```json
{
  "[resource]": {
    "[field_to_update]": "[new_value]"
  }
}
```

#### Delete [Resource]

```http
DELETE /v1/[resources]/{[resource]_id}
```

**Response:**
- `204 No Content`: Successfully deleted
- `404 Not Found`: Resource not found

### [Add more resource categories following the same pattern]

## Webhooks

### Available Webhook Events

| Event | Description | Payload |
|-------|-------------|---------|
| `[resource].[action]` | [When this event fires] | [Link to payload schema] |
| [Add all webhook events] | | |

### Webhook Registration

```http
POST /v1/webhooks
```

**Request Body:**
```json
{
  "webhook": {
    "topic": "[resource].[action]",
    "address": "https://your-app.com/webhooks/[platform]",
    "format": "json",
    "headers": {
      "X-Custom-Header": "value"
    }
  }
}
```

### Webhook Security

[Describe how to verify webhook authenticity: signatures, tokens, etc.]

```r
verify_webhook_signature <- function(payload, signature, secret) {
  # Implementation specific to platform
  expected_signature <- hmac(secret, payload, "sha256")
  return(signature == expected_signature)
}
```

### Webhook Payload Example

```json
{
  "id": "webhook_123",
  "topic": "[resource].[action]",
  "created_at": "2024-12-01T10:00:00Z",
  "data": {
    "[resource]": {
      // Resource data
    }
  }
}
```

## Error Handling

### Error Response Format

```json
{
  "error": {
    "code": "[ERROR_CODE]",
    "message": "Human readable error message",
    "details": {
      "field": "[field_name]",
      "reason": "[validation_error]"
    },
    "request_id": "req_123456",
    "documentation_url": "https://docs.[platform].com/errors/[ERROR_CODE]"
  }
}
```

### Common Error Codes

| Code | HTTP Status | Description | Recovery Action |
|------|-------------|-------------|-----------------|
| `[ERROR_CODE]` | [Status] | [Description] | [What to do] |
| [Add all platform-specific error codes] | | | |

## Implementation Examples

### Authentication Example

```r
# Platform-specific authentication implementation
library(httr)
library(jsonlite)

authenticate_[platform] <- function() {
  # Implementation specific to platform
}

make_[platform]_request <- function(endpoint, method = "GET", body = NULL) {
  # Implementation of authenticated request
}
```

### Pagination Example

```r
fetch_all_[resources] <- function() {
  all_items <- list()
  page <- 1
  has_more <- TRUE
  
  while (has_more) {
    result <- make_[platform]_request(
      sprintf("/v1/[resources]?page=%d", page)
    )
    
    all_items <- c(all_items, result$[resources])
    
    # Platform-specific pagination logic
    has_more <- [pagination_check]
    page <- page + 1
    
    # Rate limiting
    Sys.sleep([appropriate_delay])
  }
  
  return(all_items)
}
```

### Error Handling Example

```r
safe_api_call <- function(fn, ...) {
  tryCatch({
    result <- fn(...)
    return(result)
  }, error = function(e) {
    # Platform-specific error handling
    if (grepl("[specific_error_pattern]", e$message)) {
      # Handle specific error
    }
    stop(e)
  })
}
```

## Data Models

### [Resource] Object

| Field | Type | Description | Required | Example |
|-------|------|-------------|----------|---------|
| `id` | string | Unique identifier | Yes | "[resource]_123" |
| [Add all fields] | | | | |

### [Add more data model definitions]

## Batch Operations

[If platform supports batch operations, document them here]

### Batch Create

```http
POST /v1/batch/[resources]
```

**Request Body:**
```json
{
  "[resources]": [
    { /* resource 1 */ },
    { /* resource 2 */ }
  ]
}
```

## Search and Filtering

### Search Syntax

[Document any special search or query syntax]

```http
GET /v1/[resources]/search?q=[search_query]
```

### Advanced Filtering

```http
GET /v1/[resources]?filter[field][operator]=[value]
```

**Supported Operators:**
- `eq`: Equals
- `ne`: Not equals
- `gt`: Greater than
- `lt`: Less than
- `in`: In array
- `contains`: Contains substring

## Performance Optimization

### Best Practices

1. **Use field selection** to reduce payload size
   ```http
   GET /v1/[resources]?fields=[field1,field2]
   ```

2. **Implement caching** for stable data
   ```r
   # Check ETags or Last-Modified headers
   ```

3. **Use batch operations** when available

4. **Implement request queuing** for rate limits

5. **Monitor API usage** and optimize queries

## Migration Guide

### Migrating from [Previous Version/Platform]

1. **Authentication Changes**: [What changed]
2. **Endpoint Changes**: [Mapping table]
3. **Data Model Changes**: [Field mappings]
4. **Deprecation Timeline**: [Important dates]

## Testing

### Sandbox Environment

- **Base URL**: https://sandbox-api.[platform].com
- **Test Credentials**: [How to obtain]
- **Limitations**: [Any sandbox limitations]
- **Data Reset**: [Reset schedule if applicable]

### Testing Checklist

- [ ] Authentication works
- [ ] Basic CRUD operations
- [ ] Error handling
- [ ] Rate limiting behavior
- [ ] Webhook reception
- [ ] Pagination
- [ ] Search and filtering

## SDK and Libraries

### Official SDKs

- **Node.js**: `npm install [platform]-sdk`
- **Python**: `pip install [platform]-api`
- **Ruby**: `gem install [platform]`
- **PHP**: `composer require [platform]/sdk`

### Community Libraries

[List community-maintained libraries]

## Changelog

### Version History

| Version | Date | Changes |
|---------|------|---------|
| 1.0.0 | [Date] | Initial release |
| [Add version history] | | |

## Support and Resources

- **Official Documentation**: https://docs.[platform].com
- **API Reference**: https://api.[platform].com/reference
- **Status Page**: https://status.[platform].com
- **Support Portal**: https://support.[platform].com
- **Developer Forum**: https://forum.[platform].com
- **GitHub**: https://github.com/[platform]
- **Postman Collection**: [Link to collection]

## Compliance and Security

### Data Protection

- **GDPR Compliance**: [Status and features]
- **PCI DSS**: [If applicable]
- **Data Retention**: [Policies]
- **Data Export**: [How to export data]

### Security Features

- **TLS Version**: Minimum TLS 1.2
- **IP Whitelisting**: [If available]
- **Audit Logs**: [How to access]

## Related Documentation

- [API Architecture Overview](../API00_architecture_overview.qmd)
- [Authentication Patterns](../API01_authentication_patterns.qmd)
- [Rate Limiting](../API02_rate_limiting.qmd)
- [Error Handling](../API03_error_handling.qmd)
- [Other Platform APIs](./)
